mapper.select: SELECT com_no, biz_no, com_nm, status, reg_dt FROM COMPANIES
mapper.update: MERGE INTO COMPANIES t USING (SELECT #{biz_no, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS biz_no FROM DUAL) s ON (t.biz_no = s.biz_no) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.com_nm = #{com_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, t.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, t.reg_dt = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (com_no, biz_no, com_nm, status, reg_dt) VALUES (SEQ_COMPANIES.NEXTVAL, #{biz_no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{com_nm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
